Bus Timings

53 Bus Schedule Gold Souq to International City Bus Station

December 22, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus Route 53 in Dubai offers a vital connection between the Gold Souq Bus Station and International City Bus Station. It serves a diverse range of stops, ensuring accessibility to shopping areas, residential communities, and commercial hubs.

Route Name 53
Route Description Gold Souq Bus Station · 4 - International City Bus Station · 3
Total Distance Approximately 16.5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 2 hours
Operational Hours 06:05 to 01:00 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 53

Bus 53 Route in Dubai

Bus 53 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link for 53 Bus Timings.

Also See: All You Need to Know About Bus 63 in Abu Dhabi

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for the Dubai 53 bus depends on the number of zones you travel through. Dubai operates on a zone-based fare system, so the exact cost will vary based on your starting and ending points. To get the most accurate fare, you can use the Dubai Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) journey planner, available on their website or mobile app. This tool will calculate the exact fare for you. Generally, a single-zone fare in Dubai is around AED 3, but this can vary depending on your specific journey.

Bus Booking

Bus 53 does not require advance booking. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route. For convenience, you can use the RTA Dubai app to check live bus timings, route information, and to manage your Hafilat Smart Card. The app also provides real-time updates on bus locations, ensuring a smooth and informed travel experience.

Bus Route

The Bus 53 route operates between Gold Souq Bus Station · 4 and International City Bus Station · 3. The journey encompasses several noteworthy stops:

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 4

  2. Naif Park

  3. Baniyas Square

  4. Memorial Plaza

  5. Etisalat Head Office

  6. Maktoum Road

  7. Clock Tower Roundabout

  8. DNATA

  9. City Centre Metro · 2

  10. Dubai Festival City, Marks & Spencer

  11. Dubai Festival City, IKEA

  12. Hillside Village A

  13. Al Badia Residence 1&8

  14. Al Badia Residences

  15. Deira International School

  16. Al Badia Entrance

  17. Hepworth Plastics

  18. Samari Development

  19. Vegetable Market

Recommended Guides

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Vegetable Market Union Coop. Society

  2. Vegetable Market Customs Office

  3. Manama Road 4

  4. International City, Greece

  5. Civil Defence

  6. International City, Persia M03

  7. International City, Persia O02

  8. Trafalgar Tower

  9. Rivera Dreams Apartments

  10. Post Office

  11. Dragon Mart 1 External

  12. Dragon Mart 2 External

  13. Dragon Mart 2

  14. International City Bus Station · 3

Other bus routes in Dubai that you can check out include the C28 bus route, which goes from Mamzar Beach Park Terminus to Al Baraha Bus Station, as well as the C3 bus route, which operates between Abu Hail Bus Station and Al Karama Bus Station.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 53 passes several notable tourist attractions and destinations in Dubai:

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 4: Located in the heart of Dubai’s historic Gold Souq, a bustling marketplace famous for its gold jewelry and traditional shopping experience.

2.

  1. City Centre Metro · 2: Adjacent to City Centre Deira, one of Dubai’s largest shopping malls featuring a wide range of shops, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

4.

5.

6.

  1. International City: A unique development featuring themed clusters representing different countries, offering a cultural shopping experience.

These stops offer a mix of traditional markets, large shopping centers, and cultural experiences, making Bus 53 a route rich in diverse destinations for both locals and visitors.

Journey Experience

Taking the 53 bus from Gold Souq to International City Bus Station offers a lengthy yet insightful journey through Dubai’s vibrant urban landscape. Starting from the bustling Gold Souq, known for its intricate gold and jewelry market, the route weaves through key areas of the city, offering a glimpse of traditional markets and modern developments.

As the bus heads towards International City, you pass residential and commercial districts, showcasing Dubai’s diverse community. International City itself is a multicultural hub, with architecture inspired by countries around the world. Nearby, the Dragon Mart is a must-visit for those interested in affordable shopping for electronics, home goods, and more. The journey offers a blend of cultural and modern attractions, providing a unique view of Dubai’s urban charm.

Read More: Route and Stops of Bus 43 in Dubai: Full Details

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel from Gold Souq Bus Station · 4 to International City Bus Station · 3, the furthest point on the Bus 53 route, with a price range of AED 80-97. This option provides a convenient way to cover the entire route efficiently, offering a comfortable alternative to public transport. Plus, the app allows you to book your ride in advance, ensuring a seamless travel experience.

Whether you’re commuting between Gold Souq and International City or exploring the various stops along the way, Bus 53 offers a reliable and affordable travel option in Dubai. Its extensive route ensures access to key commercial and residential areas, making it a convenient choice for both daily routines and occasional trips.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
